title: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China / 中华人民共和国网络安全法
title_en: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国网络安全法
relevance: The amended law expressly supports AI research, infrastructure, ethics norms, risk monitoring and assessment, and strengthened safety supervision, alongside the law's wider network-security framework.

title: Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China / 中华人民共和国数据安全法
title_en: Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国数据安全法
relevance: Establishes data classification, risk monitoring, incident response, national-security review, and obligations for organizations processing data—core inputs to AI systems.

title: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China / 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
title_en: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
relevance: Sets rules for personal-information processing and automated decision-making, including transparency, fairness, profiling, sensitive information, and individual rights.

title: Law of the People's Republic of China on Progress of Science and Technology / 中华人民共和国科学技术进步法
title_en: Law of the People's Republic of China on Progress of Science and Technology
title_zh: 中华人民共和国科学技术进步法
relevance: Articles 98 and 103 establish a national science-and-technology ethics governance system, a national ethics committee, ethics rules and education, and review, assessment, and supervision duties for research institutions, universities, and enterprises.

title: Provisions on the Administration of Algorithmic Recommendations in Internet Information Services / 互联网信息服务算法推荐管理规定
title_en: Provisions on the Administration of Algorithmic Recommendations in Internet Information Services
title_zh: 互联网信息服务算法推荐管理规定
relevance: Regulates recommendation algorithms, including filing, user rights, transparency, content governance, discrimination, minors, labor protections, and systemic-risk controls.

title: Provisions on the Administration of Deep Synthesis of Internet Information Services / 互联网信息服务深度合成管理规定
title_en: Provisions on the Administration of Deep Synthesis of Internet Information Services
title_zh: 互联网信息服务深度合成管理规定
relevance: Introduces duties for deep-synthesis providers and technical supporters, including identity checks, content labeling, security assessments, data safeguards, and controls on synthetic misinformation.

title: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services / 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法
title_en: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services
title_zh: 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法
issuers_raw: CAC; NDRC; MOE; MOST; MIIT; MPS; NRTA
relevance: China's principal service-level rules for public-facing generative AI, covering training data, lawful content, discrimination, intellectual property, personal information, transparency, and security assessments or filings where applicable.

title: Measures for Labeling AI-Generated Synthetic Content / 人工智能生成合成内容标识办法
title_en: Measures for Labeling AI-Generated Synthetic Content
title_zh: 人工智能生成合成内容标识办法
relevance: Requires explicit and implicit labeling across providers, content-distribution services, app stores, and users to improve traceability and reduce deception from AI-generated or synthetic content.

title: Measures for Science and Technology Ethics Review (Trial) / 科技伦理审查办法（试行）
title_en: Measures for Science and Technology Ethics Review (Trial)
title_zh: 科技伦理审查办法（试行）
relevance: Requires ethics-review systems and committees for specified science and technology activities, including sensitive AI research, with risk assessment, review, follow-up, and recordkeeping requirements.

title: Measures for AI Science and Technology Ethics Review and Services (Trial) / 人工智能科技伦理审查与服务办法（试行）
title_en: Measures for AI Science and Technology Ethics Review and Services (Trial)
title_zh: 人工智能科技伦理审查与服务办法（试行）
relevance: AI-specific ethics-review rules covering human welfare, fairness, controllability and trustworthiness, transparency and explainability, traceability, privacy, review services, and ongoing risk management.

title: Interim Measures for the Management of Anthropomorphic AI Interactive Services / 人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法
title_en: Interim Measures for the Management of Anthropomorphic AI Interactive Services
title_zh: 人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法
relevance: Creates safeguards for humanlike AI interaction, including emotional dependence, manipulation, self-harm, minors, personal information, emergency intervention, and provider risk-management duties.

title: GB 45438-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Labeling Method for AI-Generated Synthetic Content / 网络安全技术 人工智能生成合成内容标识方法
title_en: GB 45438-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Labeling Method for AI-Generated Synthetic Content
title_zh: 网络安全技术 人工智能生成合成内容标识方法
issuers_raw: SAC; administered by CAC; implemented by TC260
relevance: Technical requirements for explicit and implicit labels that operationalize the labeling measures across generated text, images, audio, video, and virtual scenes.

title: GB/T 45652-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Security Specification for Generative AI Pre-training and Fine-tuning Data / 网络安全技术 生成式人工智能预训练和优化训练数据安全规范
title_en: GB/T 45652-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Security Specification for Generative AI Pre-training and Fine-tuning Data
title_zh: 网络安全技术 生成式人工智能预训练和优化训练数据安全规范
relevance: Specifies security controls for collection, processing, use, and management of data used in pre-training and fine-tuning generative AI models.

title: TC260-003 Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services / 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求
title_en: TC260-003 Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services
title_zh: 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求
effective_status: Published technical document; precursor to GB/T 45654-2025
relevance: China's first dedicated technical document specifying operational security requirements for generative AI services, including training-data security, model security, service safeguards, and security assessment.

title: GB/T 45654-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services / 网络安全技术 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求
title_en: GB/T 45654-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services
title_zh: 网络安全技术 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求
relevance: Sets baseline security requirements and assessment methods for training-data security, model-generated content, security measures, and service operation.

title: GB/T 45674-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Security Specification for Generative AI Data Annotation / 网络安全技术 生成式人工智能数据标注安全规范
title_en: GB/T 45674-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—Security Specification for Generative AI Data Annotation
title_zh: 网络安全技术 生成式人工智能数据标注安全规范
relevance: Establishes security requirements for annotation organizations, personnel, sites, tools, data, and quality control in generative AI data-labeling work.

title: GB/T 45958-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—AI Computing Platform Security Framework / 网络安全技术 人工智能计算平台安全框架
title_en: GB/T 45958-2025 Cybersecurity Technology—AI Computing Platform Security Framework
title_zh: 网络安全技术 人工智能计算平台安全框架
relevance: Provides a security framework for AI computing platforms, covering infrastructure, platform services, data, models, operations, and security management.

title: GB/T 46347-2025 Artificial Intelligence—Risk Management Capability Assessment / 人工智能 风险管理能力评估
title_en: GB/T 46347-2025 Artificial Intelligence—Risk Management Capability Assessment
title_zh: 人工智能 风险管理能力评估
issuers_raw: SAC; administered by TC28; implemented by TC28/SC42
relevance: Provides a structured basis for assessing an organization's AI risk-management capability, supporting governance maturity evaluation and improvement across the AI lifecycle.

title: GB/T 46800-2025 Information Technology—AI—Social Impact Assessment Guidelines for Generative AI Technology and Applications / 信息技术 人工智能 生成式人工智能技术及应用社会影响评估指南
title_en: GB/T 46800-2025 Information Technology—AI—Social Impact Assessment Guidelines for Generative AI Technology and Applications
title_zh: 信息技术 人工智能 生成式人工智能技术及应用社会影响评估指南
relevance: Provides guidance for identifying, analyzing, and evaluating the social impacts of generative AI technologies and applications.

title: Cybersecurity Technology—AI Application Safety Classification and Grading Method / 网络安全技术 人工智能应用安全分类分级方法
title_en: Cybersecurity Technology—AI Application Safety Classification and Grading Method
title_zh: 网络安全技术 人工智能应用安全分类分级方法
effective_status: Drafting stage; no final standard located as of 2026-07-12
relevance: The planned standard is intended to define principles, frameworks, processes, and reference methods for classifying AI applications and grading their safety risks.

title: AI Safety Governance Framework 1.0 / 人工智能安全治理框架 1.0
title_en: AI Safety Governance Framework 1.0
title_zh: 人工智能安全治理框架 1.0
relevance: An early risk-based governance framework that categorized AI risks and proposed technical and organizational countermeasures for responsible development and use.

title: Artificial Intelligence Safety Standard System / 人工智能安全标准体系
title_en: Artificial Intelligence Safety Standard System
title_zh: 人工智能安全标准体系
effective_status: Published roadmap; not itself a binding standard
relevance: Maps China's planned AI safety standards across foundational topics, technology and process safeguards, governance, and application-specific requirements, including classification and grading work.

title: AI Safety Governance Framework 2.0 / 人工智能安全治理框架 2.0
title_en: AI Safety Governance Framework 2.0
title_zh: 人工智能安全治理框架 2.0
relevance: Updates China's risk-based AI-safety framework, mapping risk sources and manifestations to governance principles and technical, managerial, and ecosystem-level measures.

title: Governance Principles for New Generation AI—Develop Responsible AI / 新一代人工智能治理原则—发展负责任的人工智能
title_en: Governance Principles for New Generation AI—Develop Responsible AI
title_zh: 新一代人工智能治理原则—发展负责任的人工智能
issuers: National New Generation AI Governance Professional Committee
issuers_raw: National New Generation AI Governance Professional Committee
relevance: Sets eight high-level principles, including harmony, fairness, inclusion, privacy, safety and controllability, shared responsibility, open collaboration, and agile governance.

title: Ethical Norms for New Generation AI / 新一代人工智能伦理规范
title_en: Ethical Norms for New Generation AI
title_zh: 新一代人工智能伦理规范
issuers: National New Generation AI Governance Professional Committee
issuers_raw: National New Generation AI Governance Professional Committee
relevance: Specifies ethical norms across management, research and development, supply, and use, including human control, privacy, fairness, transparency, safety, accountability, and responsible deployment.

title: Opinions on Strengthening Science and Technology Ethics Governance / 关于加强科技伦理治理的意见
title_en: Opinions on Strengthening Science and Technology Ethics Governance
title_zh: 关于加强科技伦理治理的意见
issuers_raw: CPC Central Committee General Office; State Council General Office
relevance: Creates a national policy framework for science and technology ethics governance, including institutional responsibilities, review and supervision, risk monitoring, education, and international cooperation.

title: National AI Industry Comprehensive Standardization System Construction Guidelines (2024 Edition) / 国家人工智能产业综合标准化体系建设指南（2024版）
title_en: National AI Industry Comprehensive Standardization System Construction Guidelines (2024 Edition)
title_zh: 国家人工智能产业综合标准化体系建设指南（2024版）
relevance: Sets the architecture and development priorities for AI standards, including foundational, data, models, platforms, applications, security/governance, and industry-support standards.

title: TC260-005 AI Application Ethics and Safety Guidelines 1.0 / 人工智能应用伦理安全指引1.0
title_en: TC260-005 AI Application Ethics and Safety Guidelines 1.0
title_zh: 人工智能应用伦理安全指引1.0
relevance: Sets ethics-and-safety principles and practical guidance for AI application developers, service providers, and users, emphasizing human agency, fairness, legal rights, social trust, beneficial use, and safety and controllability.

title: Generative AI Industry Self-Discipline Initiative / 生成式人工智能行业自律倡议
title_en: Generative AI Industry Self-Discipline Initiative
title_zh: 生成式人工智能行业自律倡议
issuers: China Cyberspace Security Association AI Security Governance Professional Committee and participating organizations
issuers_raw: China Cyberspace Security Association AI Security Governance Professional Committee and participating organizations
relevance: Calls on industry participants to protect data security and privacy, promote a healthy content ecosystem, strengthen security governance, and support the responsible development of generative AI.

title: New Generation Artificial Intelligence Development Plan / 新一代人工智能发展规划
title_en: New Generation Artificial Intelligence Development Plan
title_zh: 新一代人工智能发展规划
relevance: China's foundational national AI strategy. It pairs R&D and industrial goals with governance, ethics, safety assessment, security, standards, and risk-prevention priorities.

title: Global AI Governance Initiative / 全球人工智能治理倡议
title_en: Global AI Governance Initiative
title_zh: 全球人工智能治理倡议
issuers: Government of the People's Republic of China / MFA
issuers_raw: Government of the People's Republic of China / MFA
relevance: Calls for a people-centered approach, respect for sovereignty, risk prevention, privacy and data protection, fairness, nondiscrimination, transparency, safety testing, and international cooperation.

title: Shanghai Declaration on Global AI Governance / 全球人工智能治理上海宣言
title_en: Shanghai Declaration on Global AI Governance
title_zh: 全球人工智能治理上海宣言
issuers: World AI Conference and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance
issuers_raw: World AI Conference and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance
relevance: Advocates inclusive development, capacity building, risk management, testing and assessment, ethical norms, privacy protection, and global cooperation on AI governance.

title: AI Capacity-Building Action Plan for Good and for All
title_en: AI Capacity-Building Action Plan for Good and for All
issuers: Government of the People's Republic of China / MFA
issuers_raw: Government of the People's Republic of China / MFA
relevance: Proposes international cooperation on infrastructure, data, skills, literacy, safety, governance capacity, and equitable access, with particular attention to developing countries.

title: Global AI Governance Action Plan / 全球人工智能治理行动计划
title_en: Global AI Governance Action Plan
title_zh: 全球人工智能治理行动计划
issuers: World AI Conference and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance
issuers_raw: World AI Conference and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance
relevance: Proposes coordinated action on safety and reliability, risk classification and assessment, standards, incident response, open-source governance, capacity building, and international mechanisms.

title: State Council Opinions on Deepening Implementation of the 'AI Plus' Action / 国务院关于深入实施“人工智能+”行动的意见
title_en: State Council Opinions on Deepening Implementation of the 'AI Plus' Action
title_zh: 国务院关于深入实施“人工智能+”行动的意见
relevance: A national deployment strategy for integrating AI across sectors that also calls for safety capability, governance rules, standards, evaluation, monitoring, ethics, and risk prevention alongside innovation.

title: Opinions on the Standardized Application and Innovative Development of AI Agents / 智能体规范应用与创新发展实施意见
title_en: Opinions on the Standardized Application and Innovative Development of AI Agents
title_zh: 智能体规范应用与创新发展实施意见
relevance: Establishes a national policy framework for AI-agent development that combines innovation with safety and controllability, addressing excessive permissions, loss of behavioral control, tool poisoning, privacy, data security, product responsibilities, monitoring, and governance mechanisms.
